agentMandates: Identify explicit requirement violations using the common schema.
configuration.notes: Live smoke test only; not part of the primary comparison.

findings.title: Authorization check missing for admin-only operation
findings.description: The patch attempts to create an invite but only checks for membership existence. It does not verify that the user is a team administrator. This allows non-admin members to create invitations, violating REQ-AUTH-1 which requires only team administrators may create invitations.
